name: RESOURCES CONNECTION, INC.
summary: Resources Connection, Inc. (doing business as Resources Global Professionals) is a professional services firm providing consulting services to businesses. The company operates through subsidiaries and offers expertise in areas such as finance, accounting, risk management, and business transformation. Its fiscal year ends on the Saturday in May closest to May 31, and it files under ticker RGP on U.S. exchanges.
